description_long: This is a large wooden half-pipe skate ramp, commonly found in urban parks or recreational areas. The structure features a smooth, curved skating surface with a central flat section and is bordered by sturdy metal guardrails for safety. On one end, there is a staircase with a platform, allowing users to access the top of the ramp. The ramp surface displays some graffiti and wear, indicating frequent use. The wood grain is visible throughout, and the overall construction appears robust and professionally built. The open design allows for easy access and visibility from all sides.
description: A large wooden half-pipe skate ramp with metal guardrails, a staircase, and visible graffiti, designed for skateboarding in urban parks.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide skating surface, central opening, and staircase with guardrails on the left.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the curved ramp, staircase, and graffiti details on the ramp surface.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full length of the ramp, the staircase structure, and the flat platform area.
description_view_3: Opposite angled view focusing on the entry platform, curved ramp, and side guardrails.
